title: Glorious Golden Filipino Vegetable Lumpia
description: A tangy and festive Filipino dish featuring a vegetarian-friendly filling wrapped in a crispy lumpia wrapper, served with a side of sweet chili sauce.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the unsalted beef stock, pasta water, and vegetable oil to create an emulsion.
Add the shredded cabbage, grated carrots, chopped green onions, and minced garlic to the bowl and mix well.
Lay a lumpia wrapper on a flat surface and place about 1 tablespoon of the vegetable mixture in the center of the wrapper.
Brush the edges of the wrapper with a little water and fold the wrapper into a triangle, pressing the edges together to seal.
Repeat with the remaining wrappers and filling.
Heat about 2-3 inches of vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat until it reaches 350 degrees.
Fry the lumpia until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes on each side.
Drain the lumpia on paper towels and serve hot with sweet chili sauce.
To make the sweet chili sauce, combine 1/2 cup of ketchup, 1/4 cup of water, and 2 tablespoons of sugar in a bowl and mix well.
Add 1-2 teaspoons of chili flakes to the sauce and mix well.
